title: Happy Farm Friends Coloring Page
description: A fun coloring page featuring friendly farm animals that helps children learn about common animals found on a farm while developing fine motor skills and creativity.
instructions: Color each animal using your favorite colors. Try to stay inside the lines. You can use the suggested colors or choose your own!

content.image: A simple farm scene with four main animals: a smiling cow, a happy pig, a fluffy sheep, and a cheerful chicken. The animals are arranged in a barnyard setting with simple outlines that are easy for young children to color.
learningFacts: Cows give us milk that we can drink or use to make cheese and butter.
Pigs are very smart animals that like to roll in mud to stay cool.
Chickens lay eggs that we can eat for breakfast.
Sheep grow wool that can be used to make warm clothing like sweaters.
